seoTitle: Berri vs Bethany — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Berri and Bethany. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berri and Bethany.
heading: Berri vs Bethany — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berri, South Australia and Bethany, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berri has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Bethany (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Berri or Bethany safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berri has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Bethany scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berri scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Bethany scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berri or Bethany?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
